task_completion.description: Create a snippet tiddler named 'Snippet: Critical Warning' with the correct tag and body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Snippet: Critical Warning' in the TiddlyWiki interface. Verify it has the tag '$:/tags/TextEditor/Snippet'. Verify the body contains exactly: '@@.tc-error\n''CRITICAL:'' Ensure all databases are backed up and snapshot verified before proceeding.\n@@'.

task_completion.description: Create a snippet tiddler named 'Snippet: Info Box' with the correct tag and body text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tiddler titled 'Snippet: Info Box' in the TiddlyWiki interface. Verify it has the tag '$:/tags/TextEditor/Snippet'. Verify the body contains exactly: '@@.tc-message-box\n''INFO:'' Execution of this runbook must be logged in the #ops-deployments Slack channel.\n@@'.

task_completion.description: Update the 'PostgreSQL 16 Minor Upgrade' runbook by replacing placeholders with snippet content and updating the tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'PostgreSQL 16 Minor Upgrade' tiddler. Verify the text '[INSERT CRITICAL WARNING]' and '[INSERT INFO BOX]' are gone and replaced with the respective snippet texts. Verify the tag 'Draft Runbook' is removed and the tag 'Published Runbook' is present.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the TiddlyWiki UI in a web browser (e.g., clicking the '+' button to create tiddlers, using the edit mode, or using the snippet dropdown tool).

integrity.description: The agent correctly replaced the placeholders instead of just appending the snippet text.
integrity.visual_evidence: In the updated runbooks, the original placeholders '[INSERT CRITICAL WARNING]' and '[INSERT INFO BOX]' should no longer be visible anywhere in the text.

integrity.description: The agent removed the 'Draft Runbook' tag rather than just adding the 'Published Runbook' tag alongside it.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updated runbooks should show the 'Published Runbook' tag, but 'Draft Runbook' must be completely absent from the tag list.
